message:
docs: fix test count in analysis doc (3 → 2 discriminative tests)

The thread overview claimed 3 discriminative tests, but only 2 test
deltas were actually added in the messages (T-SCALE and T-RECOVERY).
The kickoff listed 6 ranked tests, but those weren't formal deltas.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
